task: Split planner and embedding providers, add Gemini embedding support, and repair broken sibling MCP configs
edits: Added split embedding provider config in context-orchestrator/src/config.ts.
Added Gemini/OpenAI embedding service abstraction in context-orchestrator/src/services/embeddings.ts and wired it in src/main.ts and src/services/index-service.ts.
Removed the broken MCP_DOCKER entry from C:/Users/Gabi/.codex/config.toml and fixed the Playwright MCP entry to use npx.cmd without isolated mode.
Repaired the shared qdrant-semantic-search MCP runtime by restoring a complete @modelcontextprotocol/sdk dist/esm tree from the known-good local copy.
verification: Direct qdrant-semantic-search wrapper launch no longer crashes immediately on missing SDK imports.
Direct Playwright MCP launch no longer fails immediately on the isolated/userDataDir conflict.
outcome: The orchestrator can now use a separate Gemini embeddings path, and the surrounding Codex MCP config is cleaner and healthier.
